ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "article_url" TEXT /* URL to the article */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier for the publication */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number of the publication */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume of the publication */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the publication */,
  "start_page" INTEGER /* Starting page of the article */,
  "end_page" INTEGER /* Ending page of the article */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the publication */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., journal article, conference paper, book) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the publication */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the publication */,
  "funding_sources" TEXT /* Sources of funding for the research */,
  "license" TEXT /* License under which the publication is published */,
  "open_access" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the publication is open access */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal or conference */,
  "peer_reviewed" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the publication is peer-reviewed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "orcid" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests of the author */,
  "h_index" INTEGER /* H-index of the author */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citations" (
  "citation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each citation */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication being cited */,
  "cited_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the citing publication */,
  "citation_date" TEXT /* Date when the citation occurred */,
  "citation_context" TEXT /* Context of the citation */,
  "citation_type" TEXT /* Type of citation (e.g., direct, indirect, self-citation) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("citation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_cited_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("cited_by_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citations_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "citation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "pub_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related publication */,
  "cites_per_year" REAL /* Average citations received per year */,
  "cites_per_author" REAL /* Average citations received per author */,
  "author_count" INTEGER /* Total number of authors for the publication */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the publication in years */,
  "citation_impact_score" REAL /* A score indicating the impact of the citation */,
  "citation_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of citations over time */,
  "citation_network_size" INTEGER /* Size of the citation network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_citation_metrics_pub_id FOREIGN KEY ("pub_id") REFERENCES publications ("pub_id")
)
